mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recent_views (user_id, toilet_id, viewed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{toiletId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE viewed_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT rv.*, t.name AS toilet_name, t.address FROM recent_views rv JOIN toilets t ON rv.toilet_id = t.id WHERE rv.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY rv.viewed_at DESC LIMIT 20
